user_query: I'm organizing a company event and need ideas for team-building activities. Can you suggest some outdoor games and provide images of team-building exercises? Additionally, recommend some venues in our city that can accommodate a large group.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of popular outdoor team-building games.
Search for visual content (images) related to suggested outdoor team-building games.
Find venues in the user's city that can accommodate a large group for events.
Combine the list of games with corresponding images and venue options into a single presentation.
